mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_ID , ITEM_NAME , STOCK , UNIT_PRICE , TO_CHAR(CREATE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_AT FROM ITEMS
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'ITM-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD-') || LPAD(SEQ_ITEMS_PK.NEXTVAL, 6, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ITEMS (ITEM_ID , ITEM_NAME , STOCK , UNIT_PRICE , CREATE_AT) VALUES (#{itemId} , #{itemName} , #{stock} , #{unitPrice} , SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_ID , ITEM_NAME , STOCK , UNIT_PRICE , TO_CHAR(CREATE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_AT FROM ITEMS WHERE ITEM_ID = #{_parameter}
